chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3260 of 2020 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.13704/2020 2. For orders on CMA No.13705/2020 3. For hearing of main case 17.01.2025 Messrs. Hamza Waheed and Sami-ur-Rehman Khan, advocates for the petitioner Mr. Fahad Hussain Arijo, advocate for respondent Mr. Muhammad Kamran Khan, Assistant Advocate General It is jointly pointed out that the issue has already been decided vide judgment of this Court reported in the case of Summit Bank Ltd. and others vs. Province of Sindh and others (2022 PTD 1279). In view hereof this petition may be dismissed upon the same reasoning and rationale, subject to the right of appeal to the petitioner. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
